title: lepidium setosum
intro: Lepidium setosum, also known as hairy pepperwort or hairy cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lepidium setosum include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. Lepidium setosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
